title: Jurkat maintenance (ATCC)
description: Suspension Jurkat E6-1 (ATCC TIB-152) in RPMI-1640 + 10% FBS; reseed 2 to 4 x 10^5 cells/mL, do not exceed 3 x 10^6. Source: ATCC https://www.atcc.org/products/tib-152

payload.description: Routine maintenance of suspension Jurkat Clone E6-1 T-lymphoblast cells per the ATCC TIB-152 product sheet. Complete growth medium: ATCC-formulated RPMI-1640 Medium (ATCC 30-2001) + 10% FBS. Suspension culture, so there is no trypsinization: subculture by dilution into fresh medium. Recommended seeding density 2 to 4 x 10^5 viable cells/mL; add fresh medium or split every 2 to 3 days depending on density; do not let the density exceed 3 x 10^6 cells/mL. 37 C, 5% CO2. Doubling time is not published on the ATCC product sheet, so it is omitted. Source: ATCC TIB-152 https://www.atcc.org/products/tib-152

cell_line.name: Jurkat, Clone E6-1
cell_line.tissue: Peripheral blood, acute T-cell leukemia; T lymphoblast, suspension
cell_line.notes: ATCC TIB-152. Grow at 37 C, 5% CO2. Serum is fetal bovine serum (ATCC 30-2020) at 10%. Suspension line: dilute into fresh medium, do not trypsinize. Source: https://www.atcc.org/products/tib-152

planned_events.notes: Seed day. Dilute into fresh complete RPMI-1640 to 2 to 4 x 10^5 viable cells/mL. Suspension culture: no trypsin.
Check density and viability. Keep cells below 3 x 10^6 cells/mL.
Add fresh medium or dilute back to 2 to 4 x 10^5 cells/mL. Do not exceed 3 x 10^6 cells/mL.
